flags.detail: 29 upgrades available including Python 3.13, .NET runtimes, GitHub Desktop, Microsoft Teams, App Installer, Jackett.
flags.suggested_fix: Run `winget upgrade --all` during off-hours; prioritise Microsoft.AppInstaller and Teams as security-adjacent.

flags.detail: 11 TPM-WMI errors today: Secure Boot cert updates failing with -2147020471 (Windows UEFI CA 2023, KEK, Boot Manager, Option ROM).
flags.suggested_fix: Review https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2169931 — usually resolved by a Windows Update + reboot cycle.

flags.detail: Python Launcher (3.13.0→3.13.5), Python 3.13.0→3.13.13, Python 3.14.3→3.14.4 — runtime security patches pending.
flags.suggested_fix: Run `winget upgrade Python.Launcher Python.Python.3.13 Python.Python.3.14` to patch the Python runtimes.

flags.location: service / Intel(R) Platform License Manager Service
flags.detail: Intel Platform License Manager is Automatic but not Running (Status=1/Stopped). Non-critical Intel management service.
flags.suggested_fix: Review in services.msc — safe to set StartType to Manual if it's not needed; reboot often fixes transient stops.

flags.detail: Windows Software Protection Service is Automatic but not currently running. Normally demand-started by Windows.
flags.suggested_fix: This is demand-start by design; only flag if Windows Activation errors appear. No action needed now.

flags.detail: 5 DCOM 10016 permission errors logged. Common on Windows 11, usually harmless COM+ component permission mismatches.
flags.suggested_fix: Monitor for increase; if persistent, run `dcomcnfg` to review component launch permissions.

flags.detail: 3 Intel WiFi driver events (Netwtw14 EventID -2147477586) with missing registry description — likely WiFi reconnect events.
flags.suggested_fix: Update Intel WiFi driver via Device Manager or check winget for Intel driver packages.

flags.detail: Rust build artifacts at 460 MB. Normal for an active Rust project but will grow; periodic `cargo clean` recovers space.
flags.suggested_fix: Run `cargo clean` in /c/Users/simon/larry-rust if disk pressure ever appears; safe to do anytime.

flags.detail: Larry process uptime 0.3h, CPU 0.6s, RAM 17.8 MB. Very low resource use — freshly started this session.
flags.suggested_fix: All green. Check again after a full day of cron activity to baseline normal RAM.
